creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, 18 Oct 2009, Borodin Oleg wrote:

>> Fix:
> If you only knew - did not write this.

See freebsd-stable:
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2009-October/thread.html#52235

A patch is in HEAD and will be MFCed for 8.0-RC2.

/bz

-- 
Bjoern A. Zeeb         It will not break if you know what you are doing.
